visa_types.name: Study
visa_types.visa_fees:
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge per application, as listed below-

[hun > bgd > en > Table:Study > Visa Fees 1]
- VFS Global service charge per applicant is 4845 BDT.
- Please note service fee & Visa Fee are not refundable
Other Fees
Below services to be acquired exclusively at the consulate and the payment mode is via MasterCard/Visa Card
- Diplomatic legalization: 3638 BDT/document
- Signature attestation: 4366 BDT/document
- Appeal fee: 23828 BDT
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants going for study  purpose need to apply for the given category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants going for study  purpose need to apply for the given category.

## Visa Fees
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge per application, as listed below-

[hun > bgd > en > Table:Study > Visa Fees 1]
- VFS Global service charge per applicant is 4845 BDT.
- Please note service fee & Visa Fee are not refundable
Other Fees
Below services to be acquired exclusively at the consulate and the payment mode is via MasterCard/Visa Card
- Diplomatic legalization: 3638 BDT/document
- Signature attestation: 4366 BDT/document
- Appeal fee: 23828 BDT

## Documents Required
Click here for Study checklist

## Photo Specifications
Photo requirements for visa applications
Two (02) photos must be:
- not older than three (03) months
- in colour
- european visa size picture (35 mm across and 45 mm in height)
- sharp, clear and of good quality
- full-face (showing the entire head and the top of the shoulders)
- White Background photo is required
- without a head-dress, except for religious reasons
- taken directly from the front
Glasses are permitted, provided that that the eyes remain clearly visible and there is no reflection in the lenses.
Head-dress is permitted only for religious reasons, provided that all facial details are still clearly visible and the head-dress does not cast any shadow over the face.
The photograph for visas must satisfy the requirements listed above. If those are not met, the applicant will be asked to present new photos.

## Application Form

Studies or Student Mobility Annex no.2
Application for Residence Permit
